perspectives.description: The professional athlete who is currently dealing with a minor injury and must decide whether to continue playing or rest. Their decision impacts their health and the team's chances of winning.
The team doctor who advises the athlete to rest to prevent further injury. Their concern is for the athlete's long-term health and well-being.
The future fans who will be affected by the athlete's long-term health and performance. Their enjoyment of the sport and support for the team may be impacted by the athlete's decision.
